event: View of the Pont Neuf on a rainy afternoon
description: A bustling Parisian street scene showing the Pont Neuf bridge on a rainy afternoon. Crowds of pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages cross the wide stone bridge. Tall buildings with mansard roofs line the far side. The Seine river is visible below with boats. The sky is gray and overcast. The wet pavement reflects the figures and vehicles. Flags or banners are visible on some buildings. The palette is muted grays, browns, and soft blues typical of a rainy urban scene.
